question: Which launch attributes survive basic audit and deserve management attention?

attributeSignals.finding: Over-indexes in launches versus the older base.
Still common, but usually as a support feature rather than the hero message.
Collapses after audit because retailer sustainability copy inflated the first read.
attributeSignals.evidence: Only 1 audited launch has genuine refillable positioning.

launchExamples.note: Hydrating stick launch with high brand familiarity.
Tint-led launch framed as easy daily wear.

caveats: Retailer copy creates false positives on sustainability language.
